ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(Isblank(Appartement__c)), OR(IsNew(), IsChanged(Appartement__c)), text(Appartement__r.Status__c) != "Available", OR(text(Appartement__r.Status__c) != "Kontingent", AND(text(Appartement__r.Status__c) = "Kontingent", AccountId != Appartement__r.ContingentRequester__c, Account.ParentId != Appartement__r.ContingentRequester__c )) )
